goal: Create one expected smoke evidence file through the control plane.
title: Create smoke evidence
validation_commands: python3 -B -c "from pathlib import Path; missing=[p for p in ['smoke-output.txt'] if not Path(p).is_file()]; assert not missing, missing"
python3 -B -c "from pathlib import Path; assert Path('smoke-output.txt').is_file(), 'smoke-output.txt'"
